top_signals.title: Trump says US will not invest in $300bn fund for Iran
top_signals.summary: US president’s pushback on reports of provision in peace deal comes after fierce bipartisan backlash
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: CEOs of Anthropic and Google DeepMind call for U.S.-led AI coalition in meeting at G7
top_signals.summary: Tech leaders and heads of state, including President Donald Trump, joined a meeting about AI standards at the G7 Summit.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Trump administration to pay $765mn to scuttle offshore wind projects
top_signals.summary: Power developer Invenergy will redeploy funds into natural gas and geothermal projects in western US
